## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, technical fixes, and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy shift: 105/129 sales-related product reviews completed; considering new content buckets for better performance](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Technical fixes needed: publication timeline, UI issues, internal linking, 301 redirects, and search functionality](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [SEO performance: 41 keywords in top 10, but click-through rates need improvement; meta title optimization planned](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Progress

  - [213 articles in pipeline, 105 product reviews completed](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [129 sales-related products identified, 105 done](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Considering shift to new content buckets after completing \~10 more product reviews](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [41 keywords ranking in top 10, but click-through rates are low](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Technical Issues and Fixes

  - [Publication timeline needs optimization (currently takes 45 minutes per page)](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [UI fixes required for sub-bullet points and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Internal linking improvements needed](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [301 redirects for blog pages to product pages (potential short-term ranking dip)](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Subdomain launch.demo.io to be removed due to duplicate content](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Search functionality not working properly, known issue being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### SEO Performance and Optimization

  - [41 keywords in top 10, but low click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Impressions increased from 75k to 82k](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Plan to optimize meta titles for top 40 keywords to improve click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Considering more clickbait-style titles and integrating Dimmo's tagline](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### User Experience Improvements

  - [Rename "Categories" to "Product Demos" or similar for better clarity](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Update header navigation to include new overview pages](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to optimize meta titles for top 40 keywords and share with Lucas](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Lucas to implement technical fixes, especially search functionality](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Prateek to complete remaining \~10 sales product reviews](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Prateek to propose new content buckets for next week](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Dave to schedule a call with Troy and Lucas for a deeper dive into Dimmo's goals](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring SEO performance and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/GGypz5BX5m1Tsuyn8suuXrrfMkmZvhkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
